mapper.update: UPDATE tb_user SET dept_id = NULL WHERE is_admin = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_account_type (type_name, description) VALUES ('서버', 'Linux / Windows 서버 SSH·RDP 계정'), ('NAS', '스토리지 관리자 계정'), ('SVN', '형상관리 저장소 계정'), ('GitLab', 'Git 저장소·CI 토큰')
INSERT INTO tb_permission (perm_code, perm_name, description) VALUES ('PASSWORD.EDIT', '패스워드 수정', '패스워드 관리대장 항목 등록·수정 권한'), ('PASSWORD.APPROVE', '패스워드 승인', '패스워드 관리대장 항목 승인 권한')
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM tb_password WHERE user_id IN (SELECT user_id FROM tb_user WHERE is_admin = 0)
DELETE FROM tb_refresh_token WHERE user_id IN (SELECT user_id FROM tb_user WHERE is_admin = 0)
DELETE FROM tb_user_permission WHERE user_id IN (SELECT user_id FROM tb_user WHERE is_admin = 0)
DELETE FROM tb_user_role WHERE user_id IN (SELECT user_id FROM tb_user WHERE is_admin = 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_audit_log SET user_id = NULL WHERE user_id IN (SELECT user_id FROM tb_user WHERE is_admin = 0)
